concerns.text: FR-010 (generate degree-preserving random graphs and compare observed correlation) is partially covered by T019 (generate graphs) but lacks a task to actually compute the correlation on the randomized graphs and perform the comparison. T018 handles label permutation (SC-001), not graph rewiring validation (FR-010). A missing task means the FR-010 validation step cannot be implemented.

SC-001 requires generating an empirical null distribution by shuffling essentiality labels [deferred] times. T018 mentions 'label permutation' but does not explicitly include the loop to generate the distribution and calculate the empirical p-value against the observed correlation. The task description is ambiguous on whether the full null distribution generation and comparison logic is included.

Task T009 references 'FR-009' for skipping PGLS if tree fetch fails. However, FR-009 in spec.md defines skipping PGLS when sample size n < 10. The condition for missing tree is covered in 'Assumptions' of spec.md, not FR-009. This is a stale/incorrect requirement tag.

SC-002 requires measuring stability defined as |Δρ| ≤ 0.1 across thresholds. T033 mentions calculating the absolute difference and flagging if > 0.1, but there is no explicit task to generate the final stability metric or report the pass/fail status of SC-002 in the output artifacts (e.g., sensitivity_report.md). The task focuses on the flag, not the formal success criterion validation.
